activities_projects.title: Draw the Coordinate Axes
activities_projects.objective: Understand the x-axis and y-axis in a Cartesian plane
steps: Draw two perpendicular lines on graph paper
Label the horizontal line as x-axis and the vertical line as y-axis
Mark the origin (0,0)

activities_projects.title: Locate Points on Graph
steps: Draw the coordinate axes
Plot the points (2,3), (4,1), and (1,4)
Label each point clearly

activities_projects.title: Quadrant Identification
activities_projects.objective: Identify four quadrants in the Cartesian plane
steps: Draw coordinate axes
Label four quadrants I, II, III, IV
Colour each quadrant differently

activities_projects.title: Point Naming Activity
steps: Plot 5 random points on graph paper
Label them A, B, C, D, and E
Write the coordinates of each point

activities_projects.title: Axis Points Activity
activities_projects.objective: Identify points on x-axis and y-axis
steps: Observe which points lie on x-axis and y-axis

activities_projects.title: Origin Finder
activities_projects.objective: Understand the origin of coordinate plane
steps: Draw coordinate axes
Mark the point where both axes intersect
Label it as O (0,0)

activities_projects.title: Coordinate Table Creation
steps: Plot five points on graph paper
Create a table with point names and coordinates
Fill the coordinates for each point

activities_projects.title: Positive and Negative Coordinates
steps: Plot points in each quadrant
Observe the signs of x and y coordinates
Write the pattern for each quadrant

activities_projects.title: Grid Drawing Activity
steps: Draw a grid with equal spacing
Mark numbers from −5 to +5 on both axes
Highlight the origin

activities_projects.title: Simple Shape Plotting
steps: Join the points sequentially
Identify the shape formed
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Applies coordinate plotting to form shapes
activities_projects.evaluation: Correct plotting and shape identification (10 marks)
